headline: Comcast Opens 20-Acre Kids Resort As Parks Push Expands
summary: Universal's July 1 Frisco opening targets children aged 3 to 8 with seven lands and a 300-room hotel.

headline: Xfinity Ranked #1 Nationally in Consistent Quality, Download Speed, and Video Experience in New Opensignal Report
summary: PHILADELPHIA, May 29, 2026--Xfinity has once again been recognized as a broadband leader in Opensignal’s latest U.S. Fixed Broadband Experience Report, earning more top rankings than any other major provider in the country. Xfinity ranked #1 nationally among the five largest U.S. internet providers in three key categories: Consistent Quality, Download Speed, and Video Experience. Additionally, in head-to-head comparisons within its footprint, Xfinity won for Most Reliable WiFi, underscoring the

headline: Major Studios Shave Film Slate Costs By 2.8% To Help Boost Profit By 36.8%
summary: The major studios released 97 films in theaters in 2025, the largest number since the COVID-19 pandemic; however, 19 of those films were re-releases, and the other 78 were new films.

raw.headline: Major Studios Shave Film Slate Costs By 2.8% To Help Boost Profit By 36.8%
